_comment: Chrome Enterprise policy fragment. Apply via GPO (Computer Configuration > Administrative Templates > Google > Google Chrome) or by deploying to %ProgramFiles%\Google\Chrome\Application\master_preferences. The extension ID below is the production AURO-DLP MV3 extension; replace with the value printed by `chrome://extensions` in developer mode for staging.

auro-dlp-extension-id-placeholder.blocked_install_message: AURO-DLP is required by hospital policy and cannot be removed.
